# beget_mysql_db (Resource)

MySQL database within a managed MySQL service. Manages databases with optional description.

## Example Usage
```terraform
data "beget_mysql_configurations" "config_list" {
  version = "8.0.22"
  region  = "ru1"
}

resource "beget_mysql_service" "main" {
  display_name     = "MySQL Terraform"
  description      = "MySQL service for app backend"
  region           = "ru1"
  configuration_id = keys(data.beget_mysql_configurations.config_list.configurations)[0]
}

resource "beget_mysql_db" "app" {
  service_id = beget_mysql_service.main.id
  db_name    = "myapp_db"
}
```
```terraform
data "beget_mysql_configurations" "config_list" {
  version = "8.0.22"
  region  = "ru1"
}

resource "beget_mysql_service" "main" {
  display_name     = "MySQL Terraform"
  description      = "MySQL service for app backend"
  region           = "ru1"
  configuration_id = keys(data.beget_mysql_configurations.config_list.configurations)[0]
}

resource "beget_mysql_db" "app" {
  service_id  = beget_mysql_service.main.id
  db_name     = "myapp_db"
  description = "Application database for myapp"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `db_name` (String) Database name. Changing this recreates the resource.
- `service_id` (String) MySQL service ID (from beget_mysql_service). Changing this recreates the resource.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description of the database.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier (service_id/db_name).
- `size` (Number) Database size in bytes.
